name: @happyqu/createjs-miniprogram
description: CreateJS (EaselJS and TweenJS) adapted for WeChat Mini Programs
author: happy

scripts.build: npm run clean && esbuild src/easeljs/package.js --bundle --format=esm --platform=neutral --target=es2017 --minify --legal-comments=none --outfile=dist/index.mjs && esbuild src/easeljs/package.js --bundle --format=cjs --platform=neutral --target=es2017 --minify --legal-comments=none --footer:js=module.exports=module.exports.default --outfile=dist/index.js && esbuild src/tweenjs/package.js --bundle --external:@happyqu/createjs-miniprogram --format=esm --platform=neutral --target=es2017 --minify --legal-comments=none --outfile=dist/tweenjs.mjs && esbuild src/tweenjs/package.js --bundle --external:@happyqu/createjs-miniprogram --format=cjs --platform=neutral --target=es2017 --minify --legal-comments=none --footer:js=module.exports=module.exports.default --outfile=dist/tweenjs.js && node scripts/copy-types.cjs && node scripts/sync-example.cjs
scripts.test: npm run build && node scripts/check-browser-globals.cjs && node scripts/smoke-test.cjs
